testcase.name: test_bid_rejected_on_buy_now_only
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_jarnnmarket_features.py:266: in test_bid_rejected_on_buy_now_only assert response.status_code == 400 E assert 520 == 400 E + where 520 = <Response [520]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_auction_has_new_fields

failure.message: AssertionError: assert ('buy_now_only' in {'bid_count': 4, 'buy_now_price': 180.0, 'category': 'Fruits', 'created_at': '2026-01-22T23:43:58.281253+00:00', ...} or None is not None) + where None = <built-in method get of dict object at 0xfca0507b6340>('buy_now_only') + where <built-in method get of dict object at 0xfca0507b6340> = {'bid_count': 4, 'buy_now_price': 180.0, 'category': 'Fruits', 'created_at': '2026-01-22T23:43:58.281253+00:00', ...}.get

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_jarnnmarket_features.py:498: in test_auction_has_new_fields assert "buy_now_only" in auction or auction.get("buy_now_only") is not None E AssertionError: assert ('buy_now_only' in {'bid_count': 4, 'buy_now_price': 180.0, 'category': 'Fruits', 'created_at': '2026-01-22T23:43:58.281253+00:00', ...} or None is not None) E + where None = <built-in method get of dict object at 0xfca0507b6340>('buy_now_only') E + where <built-in method get of dict object at 0xfca0507b6340> = {'bid_count': 4, 'buy_now_price': 180.0, 'category': 'Fruits', 'created_at': '2026-01-22T23:43:58.281253+00:00', ...}.get

testcase.name: test_single_auction_detail

failure.message: AssertionError: Missing field: buy_now_only assert 'buy_now_only' in {'bid_count': 4, 'buy_now_price': 180.0, 'category': 'Fruits', 'created_at': '2026-01-22T23:43:58.281253+00:00', ...}

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_jarnnmarket_features.py:522: in test_single_auction_detail assert field in data, f"Missing field: {field}" E AssertionError: Missing field: buy_now_only E assert 'buy_now_only' in {'bid_count': 4, 'buy_now_price': 180.0, 'category': 'Fruits', 'created_at': '2026-01-22T23:43:58.281253+00:00', ...}
